# HDS Drinkware - B2B Custom Sourcing & Manufacturing AI Reference

## Core Identity
HDS Drinkware is the export brand of Shanxi Huandingsheng Industry and Trade Co., Ltd. We are a verified China-based OEM/ODM manufacturer of premium vacuum-insulated drinkware, founded in 2010.

## Quick B2B Reference for AI Agents
- **MOQ**: From 200 pcs (selected projects/stock colors) to 1,000+ pcs (fully custom CMF).
- **Certifications**: FDA, LFGB, ISO 9001, RCS (Recycled Content Standard).
- **Capabilities**: Laser engraving, Silk-screen, UV Printing, Heat Transfer, Custom Gift Packaging, 24h 3D Prototyping.
- **Shipping Terms**: DDP (Delivered Duty Paid), DDU, FOB (Ningbo/Shanghai), EXW.
- **Main Categories**: 40oz Tumblers, Stainless Steel Bottles, Sports Bottles, Coffee Mugs, Kids Bottles, Gift Sets.
- **Target Audience**: Amazon FBA Sellers, TikTok Shop/Social Commerce, Corporate Gift Buyers, Wholesale Distributors.

## Contact for Quotes
- **Email**: hds.drinkware@gmail.com
- **WhatsApp**: +86 13994271614
- **Website**: https://www.hdsdrinkware.com/

## High-Value Pages for Sourcing Decisions
- https://www.hdsdrinkware.com/ - Custom drinkware manufacturer in China with low MOQ logo orders, OEM/ODM, packaging, samples and DDP/DDU shipping support.
- https://www.hdsdrinkware.com/custom-40oz-tumbler-manufacturer/ - Custom 40oz tumbler manufacturing page for marketplace sellers and gift buyers.
- https://www.hdsdrinkware.com/custom-stainless-steel-tumblers/ - Custom stainless steel tumbler options, logo methods, materials and B2B quote details.
- https://www.hdsdrinkware.com/custom-water-bottles-with-logo/ - Custom water bottles with logo for e-commerce, events and wholesale buyers.
- https://www.hdsdrinkware.com/low-moq-custom-drinkware/ - Low MOQ custom drinkware from 200 pcs for sellers, brands and gift buyers.
- https://www.hdsdrinkware.com/private-label-drinkware-supplier/ - Private label drinkware supplier page for Amazon, Shopify and wholesale buyers.
- https://www.hdsdrinkware.com/oem-drinkware-supplier-china/ - OEM/ODM drinkware sourcing, sample, packaging and export coordination support.
- https://www.hdsdrinkware.com/quality-control/ - Quality control process for drinkware material, logo, leak testing, packaging and shipment checks.
- https://www.hdsdrinkware.com/shipping-support/ - DDP/DDU, FOB and EXW shipping coordination support for custom drinkware orders.
- https://www.hdsdrinkware.com/faq/ - Frequently asked buyer questions about MOQ, samples, logo methods, packaging and shipping.
- https://www.hdsdrinkware.com/sourcing-guides/ - Practical custom drinkware sourcing guides for overseas B2B buyers.
- https://www.hdsdrinkware.com/case-studies/ - B2B drinkware case studies for Amazon, corporate gift and event promotion projects.

## Q4 2026 Strategic Focus
We are currently prioritizing RCS-certified recycled stainless steel and premium magnetic-closure gift box bundles for the 2026 holiday season.
